name: Hiddens Awakening
short_description: The Howler Hidden regains consciousness in the forest and discovers that his world has changed. Can you save the Hiddens from extinction, organize the resistance and get the situation under control ? Become the ruthless shadow of the forests in this turn-based stealth strategy game
detailed_description:
The legend tells that behind every tree, every rock, there are Hiddens, mythical creatures, guardians of nature.
That day, the Howler Hidden regains consciousness in the forest, and discovers that his world has changed…

Can you save the Hiddens from extinction, organize the resistance, and get the situation under control ?

Discover this new single player turn-based strategy game with a focus on stealth and reflexion. Build and expand your colony to gain a tactical advantage in the levels, and become the ruthless shadow of the forests.

There is no chance, no dice roll in Hiddens, every action will always have the same result. Your success depends solely on your strategy.
